name: S. Daimary
text:
Experience
1.It was a great experience and I learned many new things. 
2.The presentation was interesting and informative. 
3.I enjoyed the teamwork and communication. 

Suggestions
1.The presentation could include more examples or images. 
2.speaking a little slower and louder would make it clearer
1.More interaction with the audience would make it better. 

Highlights
1.The topic explanation was very clear. 
2.The confidence and teamwork of the speakers were impressive. 
3.The visuals and creativity were the best part of the presentation.

name: B. Boro
text:
Our AI teacher explained concepts clearly and made classes interactive and interesting. The practical examples and demonstrations helped us understand AI tools better. The teacher was supportive and encouraged creativity during projects. One improvement could be adding more hands-on activities and real-world AI projects. Overall, the learning experience was very helpful and enjoyable.
Thanks to NAYAN D. sir

name: S. Saha
text:
What I liked most about the speaker/presentation was the clarity and practical approach. The speaker explained the topic in a very simple and understandable way, which made it easy to connect theory with real-life situations. I also appreciated how they shared real examples and experiences, which made the presentation more interesting and engaging.

Another thing I liked was the speaker’s confidence and communication style.
